---
# Hugo Nissar

> MarTech engineer in Stockholm. Builds open-source pipelines connecting Google Analytics 4, BigQuery ML, AI agents, Google Ads, and revenue forecasting on Google Cloud.

This is the personal site and project hub of Hugo Nissar, hosting three
open-source MarTech projects:

1. **BigQuery-Read-Only-MCP-Server** — secure self-hosted Model Context Protocol
   server for Google BigQuery. Hard table allowlists, per-query scan ceilings,
   built-in rate limiting. MIT-licensed.

2. **GA4-Ecommerce-BQML-Purchase-Propensity** — complete BigQuery ML pipeline
   that predicts purchase propensity from GA4 events and pushes the result
   back to GA4 as a user property via the Measurement Protocol. Designed for
   Google Ads remarketing. Consent-aware. MIT-licensed.

3. **GA4-BigQuery-ML-Sales-Forecast** — pure-SQL pipeline that produces a
   30-day daily revenue forecast from the GA4 BigQuery export, using
   `ARIMA_PLUS_XREG` with custom holidays, ad-spend regressors, and seasonal
   sub-forecasts for upstream funnel metrics. Output plugs directly into
   Data Studio. Pre-release; MIT-licensed.

## Projects

- [BigQuery Read-Only MCP Server](https://hugonissar.github.io/projects/bigquery-readonly-mcp-server/): MCP server for AI agents → BigQuery, with allowlists and scan caps.
- [GA4 Ecommerce BQML Purchase Propensity](https://hugonissar.github.io/projects/ga4-ecommerce-bqml-purchase-propensity/): BQML pipeline for GA4 purchase propensity, pushing buckets to GA4 via Measurement Protocol.
- [GA4 BigQuery ML Sales Forecast](https://hugonissar.github.io/projects/ga4-bigquery-ml-sales-forecast/): Pure-SQL 30-day GA4 revenue forecast with custom holidays, ad-spend regressors, and seasonal sub-forecasts. Data Studio-ready.

## GitHub

- [github.com/hugonissar](https://github.com/hugonissar) — all repositories, source code, issues.
- [BigQuery-Read-Only-MCP-Server repo](https://github.com/hugonissar/BigQuery-Read-Only-MCP-Server)
- [GA4-Ecommerce-BQML-Purchase-Propensity repo](https://github.com/hugonissar/GA4-Ecommerce-BQML-Purchase-Propensity)
- [GA4-BigQuery-ML-Sales-Forecast repo](https://github.com/hugonissar/GA4-BigQuery-ML-Sales-Forecast)

## Blog

- [Hugo's blog index](https://hugonissar.github.io/blog/) — tutorials and comparison posts on BigQuery, BQML, GA4, MCP, Cloud Run, Google Ads, and revenue forecasting.
- [RSS feed](https://hugonissar.github.io/feed.xml)

## About

- [About page](https://hugonissar.github.io/about/) — background, focus areas, contact.

## Topics covered

BigQuery, BigQuery ML (BQML), Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Measurement Protocol, Model Context Protocol (MCP), Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Google Ads remarketing, Consent Mode v2, purchase propensity modeling, revenue forecasting, time-series forecasting, ARIMA_PLUS, ARIMA_PLUS_XREG, model evaluation (MAPE/MAE), `ML.EXPLAIN_FORECAST`, Data Studio integration, AI agents, GCP IAM least privilege, marketing data engineering.
